patch.value: Feature for health-time vector freshness checks and targeted stale-ID semantic refresh with deterministic warning output.
Health vectorization status and targeted refresh
Add pm health vectorization status diagnostics and auto-refresh stale item vectors using targeted semantic refresh.
pm health reports vectorization status and attempts targeted refresh for stale/missing vectorized items without forcing full reindex or breaking non-semantic setups.
Epic exists and targeted-refresh strategy is selected.
Keep semantic vectors fresh from health command
Reduces stale semantic index risk without heavy full rebuilds
Improves semantic query reliability in active repos
Stale vectors are detected and refreshed proactively
Users requested automatic vectorization start when items are not vectorized.
Users get fresher semantic results with minimal manual maintenance
